description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image. Define two stages: lint and test, and a before_script that runs npm install -g react-native-cli, npm install, and react-native link for all jobs. Add a lint stage with an eslint job that runs npm run lint, and a flow job that runs npm run flow. Add a test stage with a jest job that runs npm run test-cov. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
